root_cause: OCS had deterministic semantic resolution but lacked a replay-visible proposal-only binding from OCS outputs into PPP handoff candidates.
runtime_model: OCS-to-PPP binding consumes explicit OCS context, cognition, replay-derived intent, memory, continuity, and semantic resolution artifacts.
The runtime validates replay visibility, artifact hashes, known OCS artifact types, known OCS statuses, and full source lineage hash continuity.
The runtime rejects any source carrying authority-bearing flags.
The runtime generates PPP handoff candidates from replay-derived improvement candidates.
The runtime attaches semantic continuity evidence, domain resolution evidence, clarification requirements, provider necessity findings, and worker candidate findings.
The runtime marks all outputs as proposal-only and non-authoritative.
The handoff hash is derived from source hashes, candidate list, attached evidence, authority flags, status, and failure state.
Replay reconstruction validates ordering, wrapper hashes, artifact hashes, returned continuity, and handoff hash continuity.
replay_impact: OCS now has append-only replay-visible PPP handoff candidate evidence.
Replay reconstruction can prove which OCS artifacts shaped the candidate handoff.
Identical OCS artifacts produce the same handoff hash.
The runtime does not mutate source replay.
The runtime does not invoke PPP, providers, workers, approval, governance mutation, implementation, or execution.
commit_message: Certify OCS to PPP binding runtime
